welcome_message: 🌟 Welcome to MystVPN! 🔒 Reliable privacy protection ⚡ Lightning-fast speed 🌍 Servers worldwide Choose an action 👇
choose_plan: 💎 Choose a plan ✅ Unlimited speed ✅ All devices ✅ Full privacy 👇 Select your plan:
about_text: 🔐 MystVPN — your digital shield 🛡️ Military encryption — your data is protected ⚡ High speed — streaming without lags 🌍 Servers worldwide — access any content 📱 All devices — iOS, Android, Windows, Mac 🔄 Unlimited traffic 💬 Support: @Myst_support
connection_guide: 📖 Connection Guide Step 1. Download Outline or V2Ray Step 2. Tap 'Add server' Step 3. Paste the key from your cabinet Step 4. Hit 'Connect' 🎉 🆘 Issues? → @Myst_support
payment_safety_text: ✅ Paying for MystVPN is completely safe We accept payments through the same systems used by major online services. For your bank, it looks like a regular purchase with no VPN mentions. Moreover, there are no penalties for using a VPN.
promo_invalid: ❌ Promo code not found or expired.
reset_key_text: 🔑 Reset Key Your VPN key will be reissued. The old key will stop working. Continue?
reset_key_success: ✅ Key reset! A new key will be issued automatically. If it doesn't appear — contact support. 💬 @Myst_support
donate_text: ❤️ Support MystVPN Your support helps us improve servers and make the internet free for everyone. 📢 Tell your friends about us! 💬 Contact us: @Myst_support Thank you for being with us! 🙏
support_project_text: 💝 Support the Project We are a small team making the internet free for everyone. Your support = new servers, stability and growth! 🚀 Choose a treat for the team 👇
sponsors_empty: No sponsors yet. Be the first! 🌟
custom_amount_ask: 💎 Enter your donation amount in Telegram Stars (minimum 1):
custom_amount_invalid: ❌ Please enter a valid number, minimum 1 Star.
donation_success: 🙏 Thank you so much for your support! You're a true hero! Your help makes the internet more free 🌍
gift_choose_plan: 🎁 Gift MystVPN to a Friend Choose a plan. After payment you'll receive a link to send to your friend — they activate the subscription in one click:
gift_success: 🎁 Gift created! Send this link to your friend: {link} ✅ They will activate the subscription automatically.
gift_activated: 🎉 Gift activated! Your VPN subscription is now active. Welcome to MystVPN!
gift_already_used: ❌ This gift has already been activated.
gift_self_use: ❌ You cannot activate your own gift.
cabinet_no_sub: 👤 My Account ❌ You have no active subscription.
cancel_sub_confirm: ❓ Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
bypass_help_text: 🏦 Banks / Gov services not working with VPN? This is normal — Russian services block foreign IPs. One-time fix: 📱 Hiddify (recommended): 1. Settings → Routing 2. Enable Bypass LAN, Iran, China 3. Reconnect ✅ 📱 v2rayTUN: 1. Settings → Routing settings 2. Enable Bypass mainland 3. Save → reconnect ✅ After setup: • Banks, Gov services — work directly • Instagram, YouTube, ChatGPT — via VPN 💬 Still not working? → @Myst_support
cabinet_rotation_deadline: ⏰ Old key will stop working in {hours} h.
alert_key_already: ✅ Key already issued — refresh your account
alert_xray_error: ❌ Could not connect to VPN panel. Try again later or contact support: @Myst_support
ref_screen_intro: Invite friends — earn free VPN days!
ref_applied_title: ✅ Done! {days} days added to your subscription! Go to your account to see the new end date 👇
alert_no_bonus: ❌ No accumulated days or no active subscription
err_payment_create: ❌ Error creating payment. Try again later.
err_sbp_create: ❌ Error creating SBP payment. Try card payment.
gift_payment_after_card: After payment we'll send the gift link to this chat.
gift_payment_after_sbp: After SBP payment we'll send the gift link to this chat.
